name: Sanity
description: Real-time collaborative headless CMS with customizable React-based studio

description.value: Real-time collaborative headless CMS with customizable React-based studio

license.comment: Sanity Studio is MIT licensed; Content Lake backend is proprietary SaaS

deployment-model.comment: Content Lake is managed SaaS; Sanity Studio can be self-hosted but requires Content Lake backend

database-support.comment: Content Lake is a proprietary JSON-based database optimized for content queries

api-type.comment: Primary query language is GROQ (proprietary); GraphQL API can be deployed; REST endpoints available

multi-tenancy.comment: Multiple datasets per project; Growth plan includes 2 datasets with option for more

static-site-generation.comment: Works with all major SSG frameworks via API; official quickstarts for Next.js, Nuxt, Astro

edge-deployment.comment: Live CDN for real-time content delivery; global edge caching

content-types.comment: Define custom document types via schema definitions in code

field-types.comment: String, Text, Block (Portable Text), Number, Boolean, Date, Datetime, Image, File, Array, Object, Reference, Slug, Geopoint, URL, Cross Dataset Reference

content-relationships.comment: Reference fields support document-to-document links; Cross Dataset References for multi-dataset

nested-components.comment: Object and Array types allow deeply nested structures; Portable Text supports inline blocks

localization.comment: Field-level and document-level localization via plugins; AI-assisted translation available

content-validation.comment: Schema-defined validation rules; custom validation functions supported

embedded-interactives.comment: Portable Text supports custom block types and inline objects; extensible via custom components

content-versioning.comment: Draft and published versions; Content Releases feature for version tracking (Enterprise add-on)

draft-publish.comment: Every document has separate draft and published states; drafts.* prefix convention

scheduled-publishing.comment: Scheduled Drafts available on paid plans; Content Releases for coordinated publishing (Enterprise)

approval-workflows.comment: Content Releases support preview and validation before publishing; Enterprise add-on

content-locking.comment: Real-time collaborative editing model; no explicit locking mechanism

audit-logging.comment: Full auditability of publishing workflow with document version history

media-library.comment: Centralized Media Library for organizational asset management

image-transformations.comment: Comprehensive URL-based transformations: resize, crop, format conversion (WebP, AVIF), quality, blur, sharpen

external-media-storage.comment: Cloudinary integration via official plugin; custom asset sources supported

video-support.comment: Native file upload; Mux integration available for video streaming

svg-support.comment: SVG files supported via File type

folder-organization.comment: Media Library with organizational features and metadata

role-based-access.comment: Administrator, Viewer (free); Editor, Developer, Contributor (Growth); Custom roles (Enterprise)

granular-permissions.comment: Dataset-level and GROQ-filter-based content restrictions; custom roles on Enterprise only

sso-saml.comment: SSO integration with automatic role assignment based on identity provider groups

team-collaboration.comment: Real-time collaborative editing; multiplayer CMS environment

audience-restrictions.comment: Content delivery is API-based; access control implemented in frontend application

typescript-sdk.comment: Official TypeScript SDK; Studio and schemas are TypeScript-first

content-type-sdk.comment: Schemas defined entirely in code (TypeScript/JavaScript); full version control support

cli-tools.comment: Comprehensive CLI for project management, deployment, migrations, and dataset operations

local-development.comment: Run Sanity Studio locally with hot reload; connects to Content Lake API

webhooks.comment: GROQ-powered webhooks with filtering, projections, and custom payloads

plugin-system.comment: 280+ plugins available; 43 official, 237 community; extensible via React components

admin-ui-customization.comment: Studio fully customizable with React; custom input components, views, and tools

documentation-quality.comment: Excellent documentation with comprehensive API reference, framework quickstarts, GROQ cheat sheet, and tutorials

frontend-frameworks.comment: Official quickstarts and integrations for Next.js, Nuxt, Astro, Remix, React Router

search-integration.comment: GROQ queries with full-text search; Algolia and other integrations via plugins

preview-mode.comment: Visual editing with live preview, click-to-edit, and drag-and-drop

ecommerce-integration.comment: E-commerce use case supported; integrations via plugins and API

analytics-integration.comment: No built-in analytics; integrate via frontend application

ai-features.comment: AI Assist plugin, Content Agent for querying/editing at scale, Agent Actions, AI-powered translation

cdn-included.comment: Live CDN included; global content delivery

response-caching.comment: CDN caching with content-hash-based URLs for indefinite caching

rate-limits.comment: Free: No overages allowed; Growth: 5M API CDN requests, 1M API requests included with pay-as-you-go overages

free-tier.comment: Free forever: 1 dataset, 10K documents, 20 users; no overages allowed

open-source.comment: Sanity Studio is open source (MIT); Content Lake backend is proprietary SaaS

pricing-model.comment: Free, Growth ($15/seat/mo up to 50 seats), Enterprise (custom)

commercial-support.comment: Enterprise plan with dedicated support; Growth includes standard support

enterprise-features.comment: Custom roles, SSO, custom document limits, Content Releases add-on, dedicated support
